title: Cyber Digest
description: Independent threat intelligence and cybersecurity news, written for practitioners.

items.title: Inside the Volt Typhoon resurgence: 90 days of dwell, pivot and living off the land
items.content_text: The operators returned to OT-adjacent telco infrastructure in March. We reconstruct the access chain from edge router compromise to AD persistence and map it against MITRE ATT&CK v16.

items.title: CVE-2024-47575 — FortiManager FortiJump (CVSS 9.8, KEV)
items.content_text: Missing authentication in FortiManager fgfm protocol handler allows unauthenticated command execution as root. Exploited by UNC5820 pre-disclosure.
